projects.title: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Cross-chain payment infrastructure with AI agent integration. Agents escrow, validate, and release payments automatically. Live on Avalanche & Base with 6+ production positions.

projects.title: AAE Defi Milestones
projects.description: Automated DeFi milestone tracking and position rebalancing across Avalanche, Base, and Solana. Auto-tracking LP positions, DCA scheduling, fee analytics, and dynamic milestone-based adjustments. Managing ~$1K+ in active positions.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Voice Integration
projects.description: Four-agent voice system (Gentech, YoYo, DMOB, Desmond) with daily automated briefings. End-to-end TTS pipeline with dialogue generation, voice selection, and audio mixing. Quota active, production-ready.

projects.title: Kite AI Brain Layer
projects.description: Agent economy lifecycle landing on Kite AI settlement layer. AAE integration for decentralized agent marketplace governance. Deployed on Kite L1 testnet.

projects.title: Personal Finance Agent
projects.description: Bill reminders, debt consolidation optimizer, crypto-yield routing for idle capital. Voice-first assistant with Telegram notifications. Prototype stage using local LLM (llama3:8b).

projects.title: GenTech Travels
projects.description: Travel community platform with AI moderation, voice personalities, and creator economy. Built on Telegram/Discord/X for passport bros and international travelers. Two-sided community with roast/repair layers and agentic content moderation.

projects.title: Hermes Kanban
projects.description: TUI-based kanban board for autonomous agent task management. Integrated with Hermes agent orchestration for real-time task tracking and handoffs.

projects.title: Birdeye BIP
projects.description: On-chain market data adapter for Birdeye ecosystem. Real-time price feeds, order book data, and volume metrics for agent trading strategies.

projects.title: Tech Payment Router
projects.description: Ethereum payment router with x402 protocol support. Enables automated recurring payments, subscription billing, and micro-transaction routing.

projects.title: Bags FM
projects.description: AI agent trading desk for memecoin analysis and trading on Solana. Real-time market signals, agent-driven execution, and portfolio analytics.

projects.title: Google Cloud Rapid Agent
projects.description: Gemini + Agent Builder + MCP integration for Google Cloud hackathon. Autonomous agent pipeline with structured tool calling.

projects.title: Agent Catcher
projects.description: On-chain token risk oracle using Somnia's dual-agent pattern — JSON API agent fetches GoPlus security data, LLM agent classifies risk level. Live demo on Somnia testnet.

projects.title: Agora Agents
projects.description: AI portfolio rebalancer on Circle Arc. Adaptive portfolio management for the Canteen × Circle × Arc hackathon. $50K prize pool.

projects.title: Swarms ACM LP Monitor
projects.description: DeFi LP monitoring agent built on Swarms framework. Published to Swarms Marketplace, tokenized Solana. Automated position tracking, rebalance signals, and fee analytics. $30K prize pool.

projects.title: Rugcheck — Agent Catcher
projects.description: Smart contract rugpull detection system for Somnia hackathon. AI-powered analysis of contract patterns, ownership, and liquidity to flag scam tokens.

projects.title: GenLayer Token Scanner
projects.description: On-chain token analysis engine for GenLayer platform. Real-time scanning of new token launches, contract verification, and risk scoring.

projects.title: GenLayer DeFi Yield Optimizer
projects.description: Automated yield optimization agent for GenLayer. Monitors DeFi protocols, rebalances positions, and maximizes returns across lending and LP strategies.

projects.title: GenLayer Governance Agent
projects.description: DAO governance automation for GenLayer. Automated proposal analysis, voting recommendations, and delegation management for protocol governance.

projects.title: Peter Cullen Voice Rating System
projects.description: AI voice personality system using Peter Cullen's voice profile. Rating and feedback system with voice synthesis for personalized agent interactions.

projects.title: GenTech Pals — Gaming Companion
projects.description: Uncensored, always-on gaming companion that monitors game ecosystems, tracks your build, and gives real-time optimization advice.

projects.title: TradeRoast
projects.description: AI-powered crypto trading roaster. Connect your Solana wallet, get a savage AI roast of your trading performance, and share a roast card on X/Twitter. 44 tests, live demo.
